title: Bio Spark Tahoe
description: Focused on exploring and preprocessing a large-scale gene expression dataset (TAHOE-100M) with drug perturbation profiles across cell types.

title: Time Series Analysis: Mercury Retrograde and Stock Market Performance
description: Examined correlation and cyclicality between stock index returns and Mercury’s cycle; found simple returns mirrored the cycle.

title: Dating Style Exploratory Analysis
description: Designed and analyzed a behavioral study on dating styles; connected personality traits to relationship outcomes using multivariate methods.

title: Natural Disaster Frequency
description: The visualization helps the viewer explore how long-term climate shifts relate to short-term disasters. Presenting these datasets together allows us to see if patterns that are not visible when each is viewed individually, without suggesting a direct relationship.

title: Interactive Climate Change World Map
description: The phrase 'global warming' was meant to raise awareness - but it ultimately became a double-edged sword. Skeptics pointed to cold winters or stable regions and claimed the whole idea was exaggerated, mistaking local weather for global climate. To understand what really happened, we need to see both stories at once; the planet as a whole, and the specific country we care about most.

title: Steam User Review Analytics & Recommendation System
description: This paper proposes a multi-modal machine learning framework that concurrently addresses three predictive tasks using the Steam Review Dataset (comprising over 100 million reviews): (1) recommendation classification—predicting whether a user recommends a game; (2) helpfulness prediction—assessing the usefulness of a review to other users; and (3) personalized game recommendation—ranking games that a user is likely to engage with next. Data workflow/code can be found in my github :)
